data.body: Investigation RESULT: ROOT_CAUSE: reduce_all_tickets() in ticket-reducer.py produces 3-key error dicts ({ticket_id, status, error}) for empty ticket dirs — missing ticket_type, title, and all standard fields. No current consumer crashes (all use .get()), but error-state dicts flow unfiltered through ticket-list.sh output. CONFIDENCE: high. FIX: (1) Add minimum schema fields to error-state dicts in reduce_all_tickets(), (2) Filter error/fsck tickets from ticket-list.sh default output.
